data.summary: [Valentine's Day Special On-Time Gift] Sensei! To celebrate Valentine's Day, we're gifting 200 Pyrox
data.body:
[Valentine's Day Special On-Time Gift]

Sensei! To celebrate Valentine's Day, we're gifting 200 Pyroxenes every day for 6 days! It's better than chocolate! >_<

🗓️Period: 2/14 (Wed) 3:00 AM – 2/20 (Tue) 2:59 AM (UTC)
